Title: `potato-annotation` has a Project-Boundary Bypass
Description: `validate_path_security` uses string-prefix containment (`startswith`) for boundary checks. This allows paths that are **outside** the intended project directory but share its prefix string (e.g., `/tmp/potato_proj_demo_evil/...` vs `/tmp/potato_proj_demo`) to be accepted.
NotImpacted: All versions before 2.0.0, all versions starting from 2.4.5
